title: gahnia microstachya
intro: Gahnia microstachya, also known as the lesser saw-sedge or saw-sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gahnia microstachya include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. Gahnia microstachya can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and poultices.
